holdings.infoBox: SH is an equity ETF with a total of 17 individual holdings. The top holdings are ProShares GENIUS Money Market ETF stock at N/A, TREASURY BILL at N/A, TREASURY BILL at N/A, TREASURY BILL at N/A, and TREASURY BILL at N/A.

overview.description: The ProShares Short S&P500 (SH) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 index. The fund provides inverse exposure to a market cap-weighted index of 500 large- and mid-cap US firms selected by the S&P Index Committee. SH was launched on Jun 19, 2006 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: S&P 500 ETFs: 7 Ways to Play the Index
data.text: Trillions of dollars are benchmarked to the ubiquitous S&P 500. These S&P 500 ETFs let you play the index.

data.title: Volatile Market Conditions Could Drive Investors to Trade
data.text: The curious investor will naturally want to know what could be done if stocks start trending downward more persistently.

data.title: 3 Index Bear Funds Nearing Key Chart Support
data.text: Stocks have bounced back this week after falling as much as 35% in March. Capitalize on further downswings using these inverse index ETFs.

data.title: Top ETFs for Bear Markets
data.text: The best inverse ETFs for major indexes during the steep 2018 market downturn were PSQ, SPDN, and SH.
